data.title: Aptos network was not affected by Sui network Cetus incident
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Aptos officially confirmed that the attack vulnerability encountered by Cetus DEX is limited to the Sui network. The Aptos network itself, user funds and its DeFi partners were not affected.
At present, the Aptos security and engineering team has launched a comprehensive audit, and is continuing to closely follow the progress of the incident and working with DeFi partners to ensure network security and stability.

data.title: Aptos Confirms Security Breach Limited to Sui Network
data.description: According to Odaily, Aptos has confirmed that the security vulnerability affecting Cetus DEX is confined to the Sui network. The Aptos network itself, along with user funds and its DeFi partners, remain unaffected. Currently, Aptos' security and engineering teams have initiated a comprehensive audit and are closely monitoring the situation. They are collaborating with DeFi partners to ensure the security and stability of the network.

data.title: Kraken and Bitgo confirm May 30 FTX repayments plan
data.description:
Kraken and Bitgo, the distribution agents selected by bankrupt exchange FTX, have confirmed that the second repayment for creditors will start soon. The two crypto firms sent emails to their customers telling them to expect a payout by May 30. FTX creditor Sunil Kavuri shared the update on X, with screenshots of the email sent […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kraken-and-bitgo-may-30-ftx-repayments-plan/

data.title: OKX Unleashes xBTC on Aptos – 1:1 Wrapped Bitcoin Flows Fee-Free Into DeFi
data.description:
OKX has launched xBTC, a fully collateralized 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin, on the Aptos blockchain. The token lets holders deploy BTC across Aptos-based DeFi trading, lending and Web3 applications without minting or redemption fees, supported by public proof-of-reserves for transparency.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/okx-xbtc-fee-free-bitcoin-aptos-defi/

data.title: BTC price eyes $112K as risk assets 'ignore bad news' on unemployment
data.description:
Key points:Mixed results for US jobless claims fail to dent risk-asset enthusiasm. Despite concerns over the bond market, Bitcoin and stocks enjoy stability at the start of the Wall Street trading session. BTC price expectations remain lofty amid low volatility and a curious lack of profit-taking. Bitcoin (BTC) focused on $111,000 around the May 22 Wall Street open as record highs met mixed US unemployment data
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/btc-price-eyes-112k-risk-assets-ignore-bad-news-unemployment?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ledger launches non-custodial wallet specifically for Solana
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Hardware wallet manufacturer Ledger has launched a Solana-themed version of the Ledger Flex device. This touchscreen wallet is pre-installed with non-transferable Soulbound tokens, and rewards may be unlocked in the future. The device supports the secure storage and trading of Solana's native SPL tokens, and is compatible with mainstream networks such as Bitcoin and Ethereum. (The Block)

data.title: Sir Patrick Stewart and DeLorean Team Up to Reveal On-Chain Auto Reservation Marketplace
data.description:
Hollywood superstar Sir Patrick Stewart has joined hands with the DeLorean Motor Company (DMC) and DeLorean Labs as the brand prepares to launch its novel on-chain vehicle reservation system and Web3 marketplace.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/sir-patrick-stewart-and-delorean-team-up-to-reveal-on-chain-auto-reservation-marketplace/

data.title: U.S. House of Representatives to consider cryptocurrency market structure bill on June 10
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett posted on the X platform that French Hill, chairman of the U.S. House Financial Services Committee, has set the review date for the House Cryptocurrency Market Structure Bill to June 10.

data.title: James Wynn once again increased his BTC long position, with his position rising to about $720 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, trader James Wynn once again increased his BTC long position: 
-Long position: 6493.6 BTC, about 720 million US dollars
-Opening price: 108,709.7 US dollars
-Liquidation price: 99,376 US dollars
-Current floating profit: 15.68 million US dollars

data.title: U.S. House to Review Cryptocurrency Market Structure Bill in June
data.description: According to BlockBeats, FOX Business journalist Eleanor Terrett reported that French Hill, the Chairman of the U.S. House Financial Services Committee, has scheduled the review of the House cryptocurrency market structure bill for June 10. This development marks a significant step in the legislative process concerning the regulation of digital currencies in the United States.

data.title: Michael Saylor Advocates for Bitcoin Retention Amid Dollar Spending
data.description: According to Odaily, Michael Saylor, Chairman of the Board at Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), shared his thoughts on the X platform, emphasizing a straightforward approach to financial management: spend dollars, enjoy pizza, and hold onto Bitcoin. Saylor's statement reflects his ongoing support for Bitcoin as a valuable asset in the current economic landscape.

data.title: Turbos Finance: The platform was not affected by the Cetus hacking incident, all user funds are 100% safe
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Turbos Finance posted on the X platform that it has noticed that the Cetus hacking incident is affecting other DEXs in the Sui ecosystem, but the Turbos platform has not been affected by the Cetus hacking incident. All user funds are 100% safe, and the system is operating normally. Security remains Turbos’ top priority, and the team is actively monitoring developments.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: Market expectations of stablecoin market value breaking through the trillion dollar mark are too optimistic
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Despite the strong momentum of stablecoin legislation in the United States (such as the GENIUS Act), JPMorgan analysts are still postponing the prediction of a trillion-dollar stablecoin. They said that although the US regulatory framework is being strengthened, it is still "too optimistic" to predict that the market value of stablecoins may double or quadruple from the current approximately $240 billion (close to the trillion-dollar mark) in the next one or two years. (The Block)

data.title: U.S. Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs Experience Significant Inflows
data.description: According to Odaily, recent data from Lookonchain reveals that ten U.S. Bitcoin ETFs have seen a net inflow of 5,404 BTC. Notably, BlackRock contributed 4,931 BTC to this total, bringing its holdings to 643,755 BTC, valued at approximately $71.48 billion. Additionally, nine Ethereum ETFs recorded a net inflow of 222 ETH, with BlackRock adding 9,989 ETH to its portfolio. BlackRock now holds 1,318,043 ETH, worth around $3.51 billion.
